bead.title: Story 16.1: Frontend rebuild runs/[runId]/+page.svelte as tabbed run-detail page
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The runs/[runId] page is a single-panel flat view with no tab navigation, no URL-driven tab state, and no separation between Overview, Prompt, Response, Tools, and Session data. Users cannot deep-link to a specific view. Shared sub-components between the runs/[runId] and executions/[executionId] pages are duplicated.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/runs/[runId]/+page.svelte is a monolithic flat page without tab structure.
- Subcomponents for prompt/response/tools/session panels are inlined or missing; no lib/runDetail/ shared library exists.
- URL query parameter ?tab= is not implemented; tab state is not preserved on navigation.
- Depends on ddx-9228a484 (C9) to stabilize the StopCondition / run record shape before building the Session tab.

PROPOSED FIX
- Promote shared subcomponents from cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/executions/[executionId]/+page.svelte into cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/runDetail/ (tab shell, prompt panel, response panel, tools panel, session panel).
- Rebuild cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/runs/[runId]/+page.svelte as tabbed: Overview / Prompt / Response / Tools / Session.
- Implement URL-driven tab state via ?tab=<name> query parameter; deep-link preserves tab on refresh.
- Overview tab: status + last-update timestamp + run/try/work layer chip + base/result rev + link to worker page for running runs.
- Tools tab: paginated 50/page with Load more; lazy-loads on activation.
- Session tab: tokens (prompt/completion/total/cached), billingMode, base/result revs, stderr/stderrPath link.

NON-SCOPE
- Evidence tab (ddx-4cd64068, a child bead).
- New subscription infrastructure (reuse existing workerProgress).
bead.acceptance:
1. /nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/runs/[runId] renders with Overview/Prompt/Response/Tools/Session tabs.
2. Prompt tab shows full prompt body for layer=run and layer=try.
3. Response tab shows full response (run-layer) or result.json body (try-layer) with verdict badge.
4. Tools tab paginates 50/page from persisted ToolCallEntry; Load more works.
5. Session tab shows tokens/billingMode/revs/stderr.
6. Tab state in ?tab= URL query; refresh restores tab.
7. Running runs show status + 'View live progress' link to worker page.
8. Tools tab lazy-loads on activation.
9. Shared subcomponents extracted to src/lib/runDetail/ and reused by /executions/[id] page.
10. test('tab state survives navigation', ...) Playwright e2e verifies ?tab= round-trip.
11. test('deep-link to tools tab', ...) Playwright e2e verifies direct URL loads correct tab.
12. bun run test:e2e green.
13. lefthook run pre-commit passes.

{"rationale":"Passes title, explicit parent/deps, and overall task specificity, but fails the rubric on missing file:line-grounded root cause, acceptance criteria that do not name specific Test* symbols or a unique go test -run filter, omission of the required cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpkg\u003e/... and lefthook run pre-commit verification commands, and incomplete labels lacking area/kind/cross-ref facets.","score":3,"suggested_fixes":["Add file:line references to the root-cause section for the exact frontend files being changed.","Revise acceptance criteria to include named Test* symbols or unique go test -run filters, plus an explicit wired assertion for the new tab-routing behavior.","Add the required verification commands to acceptance: cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpkg\u003e/... and lefthook run pre-commit.","Expand labels to include area, kind, and cross-reference facets."],"waivers_applied":[]}
